import React from 'react'; const SavingsSummary = ({ totalSaved, monthlySavings, cancelledCount }) => { return (

Lifetime Savings

₹{totalSaved.toLocaleString()}

Total

Monthly Cut

₹{monthlySavings.toLocaleString()}

/mo

Successful Surgeries

{cancelledCount}

Items
); }; export default SavingsSummary;
